title: 40 years after Chernobyl, war brings new rounds of disaster and displacement
summary_full: Russia’s invasion deepens the saga of Ukraine’s Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. A woman who fled war and ended up there says, “We overcame radiation. We will overcome Russia, too.”
summary_public: Russia’s invasion deepens the saga of Ukraine’s Chernobyl Exclusion Zone. A woman who fled war and ended up there says, “We overcame radiation. We will overcome Russia, too.”

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia’s invasion deepens the saga of Ukraine’s Chernobyl Exclusion Zone.
